articles.title: Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby enters treatment program for a gambling addiction following transfer - AP News
articles.description: Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby has taken an indefinite leave of absenceto enter a residential treatment program for a gambling addiction. Texas Tech says it is “committed to supporting Brendan through his recovery process and to ensure his long-term he…
articles.content: LUBBOCK, Texas (AP) Texas Tech said Monday that transfer quarterback Brendan Sorsby was taking an indefinite leave of absence to enter a residential treatment program for a gambling addiction, a move… [+3842 chars]

articles.author: Jennifer Ouellette
articles.title: Study: Infrasound likely a key factor in alleged hauntings - Ars Technica
articles.description: Low-frequency infrasound (below 20 Hz) can raise cortisol levels in saliva and increase irritability.
